name: 48" Industrial Farmhouse Tech Desk with USB Dark Walnut - Saracina Home
description: Transform your workspace with the versatile Innovative 48’’ Industrial Tech Desk with USB by Saracina Home. Multilevel shelving, an outlet, USB port, and drop-down keyboard tray make it essential to the urban, tech-savvy worker. Never run out of space with the wide, long-lasting MDF desk and shelving, and save room with its small-space friendly design. Industrial wood finishes and modern matte-black steel legs make this a durable yet stylish piece.
